headline: Austin, San Jose Lead Apartments.com and CoStar’s U.S. Multifamily Momentum Index
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., June 22, 2026--Today, Apartments.com and CoStar, a leading provider of commercial real estate data, analytics and news, published an update to the U.S. multifamily market momentum index.
